name: backthread-oss
description: Backthread open-source monorepo — the `backthread` CLI, the `@backthread/redact` fence, and the `@backthread/extractor` structural extractor.
comment_build_order: The cli imports TYPES from @backthread/extractor, whose package.json points `types`/`main` at dist/ — so the extractor must be BUILT before the cli typechecks/builds/tests. `npm ci` doesn't build workspaces and the `--workspaces` fan-out runs cli before packages/*, so each script below explicitly builds the extractor first. (redact is source-only — resolvable unbuilt — so it needs no such step.)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @backthread/extractor && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @backthread/extractor && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
